title: Admin can log in and reach the authenticated area
description: Verifies that an ADMIN user can sign in with valid credentials and access the authenticated experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated area is displayed
Verify the user is recognized with admin access

title: Mesaero can view the table map and occupied table details
description: Verifies that a MESERO user can open the table map and inspect the active items for an occupied table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the table map view
Open an occupied table
Verify the table statuses are displayed
Verify the active items for the occupied table are displayed

title: Mesero can create and deliver an order from the active orders view
description: Verifies that a MESERO user can create a table order, add items, and mark the order as delivered end to end.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the active orders view
Create a new order for a table
Add dishes to the order
Mark the order as delivered
Verify the order is shown as delivered
Verify the added items are displayed on the order

title: Cashier reviews bills, pays a table, and releases it
description: Verifies that a cashier can review pending table bills, complete payment, view the receipt, and release the table for reuse.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the payments summary view
Open a table bill from the pending list
Complete the table payment
Open the payment receipt
Release the table
Verify the receipt is displayed and the table is released

title: User cannot sign in with invalid credentials
description: Verifies that invalid login credentials are rejected and the user remains unable to access the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the authenticated area is not displayed

title: Cook updates a table order through the kitchen queue
description: Verifies that a cook can log in, view active kitchen orders, and advance an order and item to a prepared state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the kitchen orders view
Verify active kitchen orders are displayed
Open an order from the kitchen list
Update the order status to a prepared state
Update one item status to a prepared state
Verify the updated order and item statuses are displayed

title: Cashier can access pending table payments after signing in
description: Verifies that a cashier can sign in and reach the table payment summary used to start billing flows.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the payments summary view
Verify pending table payments are displayed

title: Logged-in user can sign out
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can end the session and return to the login experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the sign out control
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the authenticated area is no longer displayed

title: Cook can access the kitchen queue after signing in
description: Verifies that a cook can sign in and reach the active kitchen orders screen without being blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the kitchen orders view
Verify active kitchen orders are displayed

title: Admin logs in and manages users end to end
description: Verifies that an admin can sign in, view the user list, create a user, update that user, and change the user status successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user management page
Create a new user with valid data
Update the newly created user with valid changes
Change the newly created user's status
Verify the user list is displayed
Verify the created user appears in the user list

title: Admin creates a menu category and item
description: Verifies that an admin can create a category and then create a menu item under menu administration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the menu administration categories view
Create a new menu category
Create a new menu item in the category
Verify the new category and item are displayed

title: Cook updates an individual item from pending to in progress
description: Verifies that a cook can change a single kitchen item from pending to in progress and see the update reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the kitchen orders view
Open an order from the kitchen list
Update one item status to in progress
Verify the item is shown in an in progress state

title: Mesero can deliver a single item from an order
description: Verifies that a MESERO user can open an order and mark one item as delivered while the order remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the active orders view
Open an order with items
Mark one item as delivered
Verify the item is shown as delivered
Verify the order details remain displayed

title: Admin views menu categories and items
description: Verifies that an admin can sign in and see the full menu administration view with categories available for management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Verify menu categories are displayed
Verify menu items are displayed

title: Mesero can move an active order to another table
description: Verifies that a MESERO user can move an occupied table's order to a valid destination table and see the table status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the table map view
Move the active table to a free destination table
Verify the order is shown on the destination table
Verify the source table is shown as free

title: Admin views daily sales and exports the report
description: Verifies that an admin can open daily sales metrics and export the daily report as a spreadsheet file.

Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the sales reports page

Export the daily report

Verify a report export is available

title: Admin updates a menu item image and availability
description: Verifies that an admin can change a menu item's image and stock state so it becomes unavailable in administration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the menu administration items view
Open an existing menu item for editing
Update the item image
Mark the item as unavailable
Verify the updated item is displayed as unavailable

title: Mesero can relocate an order to a free table
description: Verifies that a MESERO user can relocate an active order from one table to another free table without losing the order state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the table map view
Relocate the active order to a free table
Verify the order is displayed on the new table

Submit the login form

title: Admin manages inventory categories and stock entries

Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the inventory management page

Create a valid supply

Verify the new supply is displayed

Submit the login form

Submit the login form

Submit the login form

Submit the login form

description: Verifies that deleting a category with dependent items is blocked and a dependency error is shown.

Submit the login form

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the active orders view
Open an order for editing

title: Admin sees validation feedback when editing a user with invalid data
description: Verifies that an admin cannot save a user update with an invalid role or short password and sees validation feedback.

Submit the login form
Open the user management page
Open an existing user for editing

Verify the user changes are not applied
